commands.review_summary:
The branch migrates iMessage reply-cache, sent-echo dedupe, and catchup cursor state from JSON/JSONL sidecars into SQLite plugin state, adds doctor/setup migrations, extends plugin-state update support, and updates iMessage docs/tests.

PR surface: Source +577, Tests +359, Docs +1, Config +3. Total +940 across 31 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a migration/refactor PR rather than a standalone bug report. The reviewed path is source-reconstructible from the PR head and current main, but the PR body does not provide real doctor or live iMessage behavior proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed for the protected maintainer label, compatibility-sensitive state migration/API seam, and contributor-side real behavior proof gap.

target.title: Migrate iMessage monitor state to SQLite
target.body:
## Summary

- Move iMessage monitor reply-cache, sent-echo dedupe, and catchup cursor runtime state into SQLite-backed plugin state.
- Add iMessage doctor/setup migrations for the legacy JSON/JSONL sidecars, including startup preflight detection and archive-on-success cleanup.
- Add atomic plugin-state keyed-store updates so catchup cursor persistence can merge live/catchup writers without file fallbacks.
- Update iMessage docs to describe SQLite-backed monitor state and doctor migration.

## Verification

- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- `git diff --check` -> clean.
- `pnpm changed:lanes --json` -> `core`, `coreTests`, `extensions`, `extensionTests`, `docs` before rebase.
- `pnpm test src/plugin-state/plugin-state-store.test.ts src/cli/program/config-guard.test.ts src/commands/doctor-state-migrations.test.ts src/channels/message/durable-receive.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor-reply-cache.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.echo-cache.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/catchup.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/catchup-bridge.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/state-migrations.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/inbound-processing.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/self-chat-dedupe.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor.gating.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor.last-route.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` -> 5 shards passed, 296 tests.
- After rebase conflict resolution: `pnpm test extensions/imessage/src/monitor-reply-cache.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` -> 1 shard passed, 51 tests.
- After latest-main lint fixes: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/imessage/src/monitor-reply-cache.ts extensions/imessage/src/state-migrations.ts extensions/imessage/src/state-migrations.test.ts && pnpm test extensions/imessage/src/monitor-reply-cache.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/state-migrations.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` -> passed, 26 tests.
- `pnpm check:changed` before rebase -> Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01kszz3x6c42dhdvv6rv7b3ae7`, GitHub Actions run `26725023860`, exit 0.
- `pnpm check:changed` after rebase/amend -> Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01kt00qjck8r1s8t67m8xqphzv`, GitHub Actions run `26725654595`, exit 0.
- Post-push boundary fix on head `45cb0704bb`: `pnpm run lint:tmp:no-random-messaging` -> passed.
- Post-push boundary fix on head `45cb0704bb`: `OPENCLAW_ADDITIONAL_BOUNDARY_SHARD='2/4,3/4,4/4' OPENCLAW_ADDITIONAL_BOUNDARY_CONCURRENCY=4 OPENCLAW_EXTENSION_BOUNDARY_CONCURRENCY=6 node scripts/run-additional-boundary-checks.mjs` -> passed.
- Post-push boundary fix on head `45cb0704bb`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/imessage/src/test-support/runtime.ts` -> passed.
- Post-push boundary fix on head `45cb0704bb`: `pnpm test extensions/imessage/src/monitor-reply-cache.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/state-migrations.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose` -> 1 shard passed, 26 tests.
- Post-push boundary fix on head `45cb0704bb`: `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- Rebased onto current `origin/main` before final push; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` -> clean.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: iMessage monitor reply short-id mappings, sent-echo dedupe rows, and catchup cursors now persist in SQLite plugin state; doctor/setup imports and archives legacy sidecar files; runtime no longer reads or writes those JSON/JSONL sidecars.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on `refactor/imessage-monitor-sqlite-state`, plus Blacksmith Testbox changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: the commands listed in `Verification`, ending with post-push boundary, focused test, oxlint, autoreview, and rebase sanity proof on head `45cb0704bb`.

Evidence after fix: focused Vitest coverage passed for plugin-state, startup preflight, doctor migrations, durable receive, and iMessage monitor/send state paths; final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings; final changed gate exited 0 after rebasing onto latest `origin/main`; post-push boundary shard proof passed on head `45cb0704bb`.

Observed result after fix: no iMessage monitor JSON/JSONL sidecar runtime remains; legacy files are doctor migration inputs only, with SQLite plugin-state storage as the canonical state path.

What was not tested: real macOS Messages/imsg live send/receive.

## Size

Non-test LOC after rebase: +964/-448.
